meanings.definition: the act of removing hair with a razor
a thin fragment or slice (especially of wood) that has been shaved from something
the act of brushing against while passing
remove body hair with a razor
cut or remove with or as if with a plane
examples: The machine shaved off fine layers from the piece of wood

meanings.definition: make shavings of or reduce to shavings

examples: His back shaved the counter in passing
